University of Iowa homepage Unit Name

Home

This is a clean starting point for a new site.

What to do next

Use this page as a placeholder and replace it with your own content. For multi-site setups, add another folder under src/sites/ (alongside root/) and add a directory data file to scope navigation and branding.

Need an example?

See src/sites/demo-project/ for a minimal example site structure.
